messages.text: Hey — just following up on those shifts you were rostered for at Kallan's on Sunday (the 15th). Looks like you didn't clock in for either of them — the 15:00–21:00 and then the 21:00–09:00. Did you end up working those, or did something come up? Need to get this sorted today if you can

Abdi — quick thing. On Tuesday the 23rd you were rostered 09:00–14:00 at John's and never clocked in. This is the 3rd time I've had to flag a no-show clock-in with you in the last month — that's not okay, it needs to be sorted every time.

Did you work that shift or not? Need to know today.

Reply here when you've sorted it.

Abdi — we need to talk about Friday on Rathdowne Street at Kallan's. Where were you when you clocked in? Our system's got you 12.4km away from the address, but you should be within 500m. This is the 5th time I've had to flag a GPS mismatch with you in the last month — that's not okay, it needs to be sorted every time. What happened?

Reply here when you've sorted it.

Abdi — we need to sort this out today. You were rostered 09:00–14:00 at John's on Tuesday the 30th and never clocked in. This is the 4th time I've had to flag a no-show clock-in with you in the last month — that's not okay, it needs to be sorted every time.

Did you work that shift or not?

Reply here when you've sorted it.

Hey — so about that incident report from Tuesday at Kallan's, NDIS needs actual detail on what happened rather than just "Behaviour of Concern". Can you add some notes on what went down? Also did you call the family or guardian after? That should ideally happen within 30 mins of your shift ending.

Also just flagged your hours for this period — you've clocked 11.8h but you're only rostered for 6.0h. Can you double-check which extra hours were authorised before we process billing?

Get back to me when you can today?

Hey — quick one on Tuesday at Kallan's. The system force-closed your shift at 15:10, but it looks like you didn't clock out manually before that happened. Do you remember what time you actually left? Just need to get that sorted so the hours line up.

Also, I've got your shift amendment from Wednesday — notes have come through and I'm reviewing it now, so no action needed from you there.

Reply here when you've sorted it.

Hey — just caught something on your shift at Kallan's yesterday. The system force-closed at 15:10 but you didn't clock out manually before that happened — this is the second time I've had to flag this. Do you remember what time you actually left? Need to get that sorted so the hours line up properly.

Also got your shift amendment notes through — I'm reviewing them now so no action needed from you there.

Reply here when you've sorted it.

Hey — still need you to sort a couple of things from the Kallan's shift on Friday.

First: the incident report has no record of you notifying the family or guardian after it happened. That needs to happen within 30 mins of your shift ending — can you go back into the incident report and add who you called and when? Also need actual detail on what happened, not just "Behaviour of Concern".

Second: this is the second time I've had to flag this — you didn't clock out manually before the system closed at 15:10. Do you remember what time you actually left? Need that to get your hours sorted.

Reply here when you've sorted it.

Ali — need to flag a couple of things from the Kallan's shift on Friday, and this is the 3rd time I've had to bring these up, so they need to be sorted every time from now on.

First: the incident report has no record of you notifying the family or guardian after it happened. That needs to happen within 30 mins of your shift ending. Go into the incident report in Connecteam and add who you called and when. Also need actual detail on what happened — not just "Behaviour of Concern".

Second: you didn't clock out manually before the system closed at 15:10. What time did you actually leave?

Reply here when you've sorted it.

Ali — need to flag something serious. You've clocked 18.0h this period but you're only rostered for 6.0h. That's 12 extra hours, and this is the 3rd time I've had to flag overbilling issues with you in the last 30 days — that's not okay.

Before I process any billing, I need you to go through and verify which of those extra hours were actually authorised. If they weren't approved, they can't go through.

Also got your shift amendments from Tuesday and Wednesday — notes have come through and I'm reviewing them now, so no action needed from you there.

Reply here when you've sorted it.

Ali — this is the 3rd time I've had to flag the auto clock-out issue at Kallan's on Tuesday. You didn't clock out manually before the system closed at 15:10 — what time did you actually leave? This needs to be sorted every time, not just when I chase it up.

Reply here when you've sorted it.

Just following up on a couple things from Thursday at Kallan's — you clocked in at 18:37 but your shift was meant to start at 15:00. What happened there? Were you running late or was there something else going on?

Also heads up, you didn't manually clock out so the system auto-closed it at 21:10. Just make sure you're clocking yourself out at the end of your shifts going forward, yeah?

Your shift amendment's pending on our end so we'll get back to you on that once we've reviewed it 👍

Just a heads up — we've got a couple of shift amendments from you that are pending review. Your notes from Kallan's on Saturday the 27th and Joshua's on Sunday the 28th have come through and we're looking them over now. Nothing you need to do on your end, just wanted you to know we've got them 👍

Reply here when you've sorted it.

Hey — just flagged something that needs sorting today. You didn't clock in at all for your shift at Kallan's on Tuesday the 30th (was meant to be 21:00–09:00). Did you end up working that one? If you did, you'll need to add the amendment in Connecteam so we can get it processed.

Reply here when you've sorted it.
Quick question on the shift at Nada Haliem's on Monday the 22nd — you clocked out at 13:10 but were scheduled until 4? What happened there? Need to get that sorted today if you can

Also just so you know, we got your shift amendment request for that day and it's pending review — your notes are in, no action needed from you there.

One more thing from Nada Haliem's — the system auto-closed your shift on Saturday the 27th at 16:10, so you didn't clock out manually. Can you sort that in Connecteam today?

Also just a heads up on your shift amendment request for that day — we've got your notes and it's pending review, no action needed from you there.

Reply here when you've sorted it.

Just a heads up — you've got a shift amendment pending for Monday the 29th at Nada Haliem's. Your notes are in and we're reviewing it, so nothing you need to do on your end. Just wanted to let you know it's in progress.

Hey Mayada — this is the second time I've had to flag this with you. The system auto-closed your shift at Nada Haliem's on Monday the 29th at 16:10, so you didn't clock out manually. Can you sort that in Connecteam today?

Just following up on Saturday at Kallan's — we've got no record of you clocking in for that 15:00 shift. Did that end up happening? Hey, still waiting on that answer about Saturday at Kallan's — did you work that 15:00 shift or not?

Also need to flag something more urgent: on Tuesday you left Kallan's at 21:58 when you were scheduled until 09:00 — that's 662 minutes early. And this is the 3rd time I've had to flag you not clocking out manually. That's not okay, it needs to be sorted every single time.

On top of that, you've clocked 29 hours this period but you're only rostered for 24. I need you to confirm which of those extra hours were approved before we can bill them.

These need sorting today — can you get back to me on all three?

Reply here when you've sorted it.

Mohamed, still need that answer on Saturday at Kallan's — did you work that 15:00 shift or not?

Also, this is the 4th time I've had to flag you not clocking out manually. On Tuesday you left at 21:58 when you were meant to be there until 09:00, and the system had to force-close your shift. That's not okay — it needs to be sorted every single time. Clock out properly before you leave, yeah?

One more thing — you've clocked 29 hours this period but you're only rostered for 24. Which of those extra hours were approved? I need to know before we can bill them.

Hey, I need to flag a few things from Friday at Kallan's. First — you clocked in and out at 15:08, so the shift's showing as 0 minutes. Was that a double clock-in by accident or did something go wrong?

Also, there's an incident report filed for that day (Entry #343) but it needs some work. The language is a bit too subjective in places — stuff like "stormed back inside" and "got angry" needs to be more factual descriptions of what actually happened. And we need to know who was notified after the incident — that's gotta be documented. Can you go back into that incident report in Connecteam and tighten it up?

Reply here when you've sorted it.

Mohamed, need to sort a few things from Saturday at Kallan's.

First — you clocked in at 16:16 when you were scheduled for 15:00. That's 76 minutes late. Where were you when you clocked in?

Also, this is the 5th time I've had to flag you not clocking out manually. The system force-closed your shift at 15:10 and again at 21:10 because you didn't clock out properly. That's not okay — you need to clock out every single time before you leave, yeah?

Reply here when you've sorted it.

Mohamed, couple of things from Sunday at Kallan's. You didn't clock out manually — the system had to force-close your shift at both 15:10 and 21:10. This is the 7th time I've had to flag this in the last month, and that's not okay. You need to clock out every single time before you leave, yeah?

Also got your shift amendment notes through for Monday — they're pending review on our end, so nothing else needed from you on that one.

Mohamed, need to flag a couple of things from your recent shifts.

Yeah so I've looked into those for you — couple things with Joshua that need sorting.

Monday the 22nd, he clocked in at 10:25 but left at 11:49 — so nearly 2.5 hours early when he was meant to be there til 2. This one's come up before so just want to make sure we get it sorted this time. What happened there?

Also Tuesday the 23rd is a bit messier — he was over 2 hours late clocking in (showed up at 11:05 when shift started at 9) and then clocked out early again at 12:22. 

Can you get back to me on what was going on with those shifts? Need to nail this down today if possible.

So just checking in on a couple things from your recent shifts at Joshua's — on Monday the 22nd you clocked out at 11:49 when you were meant to be there til 2, and then Tuesday the 23rd you clocked in late at 11:05 and left again at 12:22. Also, that incident report from Wednesday at Kallan's just says "Training cancelled" but NDIS needs way more detail about what actually happened. And I need to know who you notified (guardian, family, whoever). Can you fill that in today?

Just reply when you get a chance.

Roja, this is the 4th time I've had to flag this — that's not okay. You didn't clock in for your shifts at Kallan's on Tuesday (23rd) and Wednesday (24th), both 15:00–21:00. Did you work those shifts? You need to clock in every single time — no exceptions.

Also need you to open the incident report from Wednesday at Kallan's and fill in the actual details about what happened with the training. Just saying "Training cancelled" isn't enough for NDIS — they need to know what went down and who you notified. Do that today when you get a chance.
